evidence.snippet: AVT Australia is a leading supplier of lightweight, gyro-stabilised imaging systems for intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) and target acquisition operations. Recognised for our expertise in advanced engineering services, AVT Australia is a trusted supplier of imaging solutions for our Australian defence customers and international customers, with systems supporting operations in over 50 countries.

Designed for Group 1 and 2 UAS, the CM102 gimbal combines high-definition EO and LWIR imagery in a compact gyro-stabilised imaging system weighing under 900g. With two-axis active stabilisation, the CM102 offers long-range intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) capabilities that are ideal for UAS operations.

items.notes: Gyro-stabilised EO/IR gimbals for ISR and target acquisition; designed for Group 1 and 2 UAS

evidence.snippet:
#### CUAS Suite
CUAS Suite is a world-leading software solution for combating hostile sUAS systems, developed specifically for counter-small uncrewed aerial system (C-sUAS) and aerial defence operations. The interface effectively integrates every component required for successful detection, classification, location, tracking, identification, and defeat of airborne threats.

items.notes: CUAS Suite: software solution for counter-sUAS operations (detection, tracking, defeat of airborne threats)

evidence.snippet:
#### VEXOS
AVT Australia’s proprietary Command and Control (C2) software, VEXOS, is an intuitive, real-time user-interface that facilitates seamless C2 of our imaging systems. An effective user-interface reduces workload, decreases training, and allows for easier mission operation.

items.notes: VEXOS: proprietary C2 software for their imaging systems

AVT Australia is a leading supplier of lightweight, gyro-stabilised imaging systems for intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) and target acquisition operations. Recognised for our expertise in advanced engineering services, AVT Australia is a trusted supplier of imaging solutions for our Australian defence customers and international customers, with systems supporting operations in over 50 countries.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures ISR payload gimbals (EO/IR, gyro-stabilised) specifically for Group 1-2 UAS; does not make complete drone platforms

CM102 Gimbal
============
Designed for Group 1 and 2 UAS, the CM102 gimbal combines high-definition EO and LWIR imagery in a compact gyro-stabilised imaging system weighing under 900g. With two-axis active stabilisation, the CM102 offers long-range intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) capabilities that are ideal for UAS operations.

evidence.snippet:
#### VEXOS
AVT Australia’s proprietary Command and Control (C2) software, VEXOS, is an intuitive, real-time user-interface that facilitates seamless C2 of our imaging systems. An effective user-interface reduces workload, decreases training, and allows for easier mission operation.

#### CUAS Suite
CUAS Suite is a world-leading software solution for combating hostile sUAS systems, developed specifically for counter-small uncrewed aerial system (C-sUAS) and aerial defence operations. The interface effectively integrates every component required for successful detection, classification, location, tracking, identification, and defeat of airborne threats.

readiness.notes: ISO 9001:2015 certified; systems deployed in 50+ countries; explicitly states design, development, manufacture and support of imaging systems

unresolved_questions: CM202a and CM202u appear as failed product page URLs — unclear if these are legacy models or new variants not in the main nav
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance information found anywhere in the corpus

fetch_requests.reason: CM62 is a primary product family (micro gimbal with on-gimbal object recognition) but the product page was skipped; would confirm full spec and product type details
CM234 product page was skipped; news article mentions CM234 selected for ADF TUAS program which would confirm production readiness and defence customer details
Failed product page for CM202a — likely an additional gimbal variant not listed in nav; would confirm full product portfolio
Contact page was skipped; may contain full street address and additional HQ details beyond North Melbourne listed on about-us

tagline: Gyro-stabilized EO/IR imaging gimbals and ISR software for airborne, maritime, and ground platforms. CM234 selected for Australian Defence Force TUAS (Land 129 Phase 3). NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence thin on US supplier relationships or allied integration pathways beyond ADF programs.
